title: Create new Doc from the API
excerpt:
Is there a way to create a new doc from the GraphQL API? 
This page docs shows how to query docs. This page docs blocks shows how to edit an existing doc (create and edit doc blocks). I couldn’t find an option to create …

posts.author: ori-matityahu-agat (Ori Matityahu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to create a new doc from the GraphQL API?
This page docs shows how to query docs. This page docs blocks shows how to edit an existing doc (create and edit doc blocks). I couldn’t find an option to create a doc from the API.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ori-matityahu-agat,

Currently, our API does not support the creation of docs

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an ETA for create a new doc from the GraphQL API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Nir-Jetpack ,

We do not have an ETA right now, but we will share any news in the changelog!
